title: Scotch Egg British Bites
description: A twist on the classic scotch egg recipe, with a spicy kick from the provolone cheese and a crunchy coating.
instructions: Wrap each scotch egg with a piece of British form, pressing gently to adhere.
Dip each coated scotch egg into the provolone cheese, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated scotch eggs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the mighty spicy sauce over the top of each scotch egg.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the breadcrumbs are golden brown.
